goal: Build a long-term BTC position in two tranches: $7k done, $7k reserved for a defined dip. Trade the checklist, not feelings.
rules: SIZING VALIDATED: $14k total = 4.7% of $300k fund — inside the 5% risk-asset cap. Do not exceed ~$15k (5%) total without re-checking.
Tranche 2 ($7k) fires on a DEFINED dip — not just any red candle: retest of the $60.8k low, OR a B-trigger (B1 capitulation volume / B6 failed new low)
If it never dips and instead reclaims $65,234 on volume, deploy tranche 2 as a breakout-confirm add instead — don't get left behind waiting for a dip that doesn't come
Tranche size: small enough to survive a leg to $40k without selling (-70% on $14k = -$9.8k = 3.3% of fund — survivable)
Scale out only on 2+ froth (X) signals
